summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated open PRs are classified conservatively as independent backlog/review items; refs whose live state was unavailable due GitHub API rate limiting are scoped needs_human/refetch decisions only.

actions.reason: Independent open PR requiring normal maintainer review; no closure, merge, or security route is supported by this plan artifact.

Draft independent fix PR; not eligible for closure or merge planning in this shard.
Independent ready-looking PR that needs normal maintainer review outside this plan-only inventory job.

Independent test coverage PR; keep for maintainer review.
Independent gateway fix with incomplete check data and dirty merge state; not closable or mergeable in this plan.
Independent author-followup PR; keep open.
Independent ready-for-review PR; merge cannot be planned under this job.
Independent docs PR; keep open for author/maintainer handling.

Independent maintainer-owned fix PR; no merge/fix action is allowed by this job.
Independent memory-core fix; keep for normal review because partial enrichment is insufficient for closure or merge.

Independent small docs PR; keep open.
Draft independent agents fix; keep open for author/maintainer follow-up.
